parameters.formDescription: Carga o edita una trivia. Las posiciones A/B/C se asignarán aleatoriamente. El campo Fecha/Hora de Envío es la hora exacta de Bogotá en que enviarás la difusión manual en WATI.

values.fieldLabel: Fecha y hora de envío Bogotá (AAAA-MM-DD HH:MM)
values.placeholder: Ej: 2026-06-11 09:00 — Esta es la hora en que envías la difusión manual en WATI

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ct_trivias (trivia_number, question, correct_answer, wrong_1, wrong_2, option_a, option_b, option_c, correct_option, sent_at, closes_at, has_multiplier, status, created_by)
VALUES ({{ $json.trivia_number }}, '{{ $json.question.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.correct_answer.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.wrong_1.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.wrong_2.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.option_a.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.option_b.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.option_c.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', '{{ $json.correct_option }}', '{{ $json.sent_at_utc }}', '{{ $json.closes_at_utc }}', {{ $json.has_multiplier === 'true' }}, '{{ $json.status }}', 'formulario')
RETURNING trivia_id, trivia_number

UPDATE ct_trivias SET question = '{{ $json.question.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', correct_answer = '{{ $json.correct_answer.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', wrong_1 = '{{ $json.wrong_1.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', wrong_2 = '{{ $json.wrong_2.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', option_a = '{{ $json.option_a.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', option_b = '{{ $json.option_b.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', option_c = '{{ $json.option_c.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', correct_option = '{{ $json.correct_option }}', sent_at = '{{ $json.sent_at_utc }}', closes_at = '{{ $json.closes_at_utc }}', has_multiplier = {{ $json.has_multiplier === 'true' }}, status = '{{ $json.status }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE trivia_number = {{ $json.trivia_number }} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE trivia_id = ct_trivias.trivia_id LIMIT 1) RETURNING trivia_id, trivia_number
